title: Rust: Add queue latency metrics to TxQueueStats
description:
TxQueueStats in rust/lichen-core/src/tx_queue.rs needs:
- packets_queued (cumulative counter, not just depth snapshot)
- packets_dropped_deadline
- packets_dropped_full
- max_latency_ms
- avg_latency_ms

Requires:
1. Store enqueue timestamp on each TxItem
2. Track max/avg latency on dequeue
3. Add separate counters for deadline vs full drops
4. Expose via stats() method

Reference: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md lines 138-152
close_reason: Implemented: Added queue latency metrics to TxQueueStats per spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md. Added packets_queued counter, renamed packets_expired to packets_dropped_deadline, added packets_dropped_full counter, and added max_latency_ms/avg_latency_ms tracking via EWMA. TxItem now stores enqueue timestamp, and pop() takes now_ms to compute latency. 6 new tests verify the metrics.
